config.note: HAL answers from the local registry first. The external-action firewall runs before any model, so submit/email/upload/writeback never reach a model. Unmatched questions use the local 14B chat lane; explicit prioritization/planning requests use the local reasoning lane. No 21B tag is installed, so the reasoning lane maps to mistral-small3.1:24b; change config.reasoningModel.model to use a different local tag. All model use is read-only and drafts text only.

lanes.name: 14B chat lane
willAllow: Answer general staff questions about the program

lanes.name: 21B reasoning lane
lanes.role: Program review, prioritization, and structured reasoning

lanes.name: 30B escalation lane
lanes.role: Second-opinion review for complex or high-risk questions
